top_signals.title: Companies are demanding states cut red tape. Data center-wary voters may think differently
top_signals.summary: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro touted a $20 billion economic development deal last June, the state's largest ever. It's caused Shapiro no shortage of grief.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX stock tanks 16%, extending slump following post-IPO rally
top_signals.summary: A rally following the company's record breaking IPO on June 12 has cooled, with stock dropping the past three days of trading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
